# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- When the user asks for a .md document for a concept, create it in the `docs` folder at the repository root (D:\Nuthan Learnings\Blazor-Demos\docs).
- When the user mentions "issues", create a .md file documenting the issue in the directory `Issues-with-Answers-docs` at the root of the workspace (`D:\Nuthan Learnings\Blazor-Demos\Issues-with-Answers-docs`). The .md file should have headings: Issue, Reason for the Issue, and Fix.

## Code Style
- Use specific formatting rules
- Follow naming conventions
